☸ AntaraVishnu1000
Shri Viṣṇu Sahasranama Self-Study (Adi Shankara Bhashya)
001
ॐ विश्वाय नमः Om Vishwamḥ Namaḥ
Universe
This name reveals the Supreme Lord as the protector who maintains the cosmic balance. Spiritually, it assures us that we are always safe under divine protection.
Meditating on this quality dispels inner fear and strengthens devotion.
002
ॐ विष्णवे नमः Om Vishnuḥ Namaḥ
All-Pervading One
This name represents the divine consciousness that holds and nourishes all beings. It teaches us that selfless service and compassion are the highest forms of worship.
Contemplating this name fills the heart with universal love and gratitude.
003
ॐ वषट्काराय नमः Om Vashatkaaraḥ Namaḥ
Lord of Sacrificial Invocation
This name symbolizes the all-pervading sustenance and constant nourishment of the universe. In meditation, this attribute reminds us of the protective force that sustains our existence.
Chanting this name cultivates a deep sense of security, contentment, and peace.
004
ॐ भूत-भव्य-भवत्-प्रभवे नमः Om Bhuta-bhavya-bhavat-prabhuḥ Namaḥ
Lord of Time
This name reveals the Supreme Lord as the protector who maintains the cosmic balance. Spiritually, it assures us that we are always safe under divine protection.
Meditating on this quality dispels inner fear and strengthens devotion.

Meditating on this quality dispels inner fear and strengthens devotion.
008

Meditating on this name calms mental chatter and fosters deep contemplation.

This name symbolizes the all-pervading sustenance and constant nourishment of the universe. In meditation, this attribute reminds us of the protective force that sustains our existence.
Chanting this name cultivates a deep sense of security, contentment, and peace.
010

Purest Soul
This name represents the illuminator of intellect and the source of ultimate wisdom. Spiritually, it dispels the darkness of ignorance and kindles the light of discernment.
Meditating on this quality reveals the true self and leads to self-realization.
011
ॐ परमात्मने नमः Om Paramatmaḥ Namaḥ

This name denotes the highest ideal of meditation, yoga, and inner focus. It teaches that stability of mind and looking inward are essential for spiritual discovery.
Meditating on this name calms mental chatter and fosters deep contemplation.
012

This name symbolizes pure consciousness, the witness spirit, and the indwelling guide. In meditation, it shows that the awareness within us is the only truth, untouched by pleasure and pain.
Chanting this aligns the seeker with the silent inner witness.

Shri Viṣṇu Sahasranama Self-Study (Adi Shankara Bhashya)
465
ॐ स्वापनाय नमः Om Svapanaḥ Namaḥ
Inducer of Cosmic Sleep
This name symbolizes pure consciousness, the witness spirit, and the indwelling guide. In meditation, it shows that the awareness within us is the only truth, untouched by pleasure and pain.
Chanting this aligns the seeker with the silent inner witness.
466
ॐ स्ववशाय नमः Om Svavashaḥ Namaḥ
Absolutely Independent One
This name symbolizes the supreme auspiciousness, peace, and benevolent energy. In spiritual practice, this attribute ward off negativity and ushers in divine grace and joy.
Meditating on this name aligns one with the blessings of the cosmos.
467
ॐ व्यापिने नमः Om Vyapiḥ Namaḥ
Infinite Pervader
This name represents the divine consciousness that holds and nourishes all beings. It teaches us that selfless service and compassion are the highest forms of worship.
Contemplating this name fills the heart with universal love and gratitude.
468
ॐ नैकात्मने नमः Om Naikatmaḥ Namaḥ
Multi-Existent Soul
This name represents the imperishable, eternal, and transcendent reality beyond the senses. It shows that truth is beyond the limits of space, time, and matter, having no beginning or end.
Contemplating this raises the seeker above impermanence.

Shri Viṣṇu Sahasranama Self-Study (Adi Shankara Bhashya)
769
ॐ चतुरात्मने नमः Om Chaturatmaḥ Namaḥ
Fourfold Soul
This name reveals the Supreme Lord as the protector who maintains the cosmic balance. Spiritually, it assures us that we are always safe under divine protection.
Meditating on this quality dispels inner fear and strengthens devotion.
770
ॐ चतुर्भावाय नमः Om Chatur-bhavaḥ Namaḥ
Origin Source of Four Modes of Existence
This name represents the supreme architect of the universe and the dawn of life. This attribute reminds us that our inner consciousness is the mother of all thoughts.
Focusing on this divine form purifies the mind and fills it with creative clarity.
771
ॐ चतुर्वेदविद् नमः Om Chatur-veda-vidḥ Namaḥ
Perfect Master Knower of Four Vedas
This name symbolizes pure consciousness, the witness spirit, and the indwelling guide. In meditation, it shows that the awareness within us is the only truth, untouched by pleasure and pain.
Chanting this aligns the seeker with the silent inner witness.
772
ॐ एकपाते नमः Om Ekapaatḥ Namaḥ
He Who Pervades Everything with One Quarter Part
This name symbolizes the supreme auspiciousness, peace, and benevolent energy. In spiritual practice, this attribute ward off negativity and ushers in divine grace and joy.
Meditating on this name aligns one with the blessings of the cosmos.

ॐ प्राग्वंशाय नमः Om Pragvamshaḥ Namaḥ

This name highlights the compassionate power that responds to the call of seekers and removes obstacles. It teaches that complete trust in the divine presence dispels all anxiety.
Remembering this name fills the heart with joy and gratitude.
846

Contemplating this raises the seeker above impermanence.

Meditating on this quality dispels inner fear and strengthens devotion.

ॐ शार्ङ्गधन्वने नमः Om Sharnga-dhanvaḥ Namaḥ
Master Archer of Sharnga Bow
This name represents the imperishable, eternal, and transcendent reality beyond the senses. It shows that truth is beyond the limits of space, time, and matter, having no beginning or end.
Contemplating this raises the seeker above impermanence.

Shri Viṣṇu Sahasranama Self-Study (Adi Shankara Bhashya)
997
ॐ गदाधराय नमः Om Gadadharaḥ Namaḥ
Bearer of the Mighty Mace
This name reveals the Supreme Lord as the protector who maintains the cosmic balance. Spiritually, it assures us that we are always safe under divine protection.
Meditating on this quality dispels inner fear and strengthens devotion.
998
ॐ रथांगपाणये नमः Om Rathanga-paniḥ Namaḥ
Wielder of Chariot Wheel
This name represents the supreme architect of the universe and the dawn of life. This attribute reminds us that our inner consciousness is the mother of all thoughts.
Focusing on this divine form purifies the mind and fills it with creative clarity.
999
ॐ अक्षोभ्याय नमः Om Akshobhyaḥ Namaḥ
Indisturbable Serene Untouched Core
This name symbolizes pure consciousness, the witness spirit, and the indwelling guide. In meditation, it shows that the awareness within us is the only truth, untouched by pleasure and pain.
Chanting this aligns the seeker with the silent inner witness.
1000
ॐ सर्वप्रहरणायुधाय नमः Om Sarva-praharanayudhaḥ Namaḥ
Wielder of All Cosmic Weapons
This name symbolizes the supreme auspiciousness, peace, and benevolent energy. In spiritual practice, this attribute ward off negativity and ushers in divine grace and joy.
Meditating on this name aligns one with the blessings of the cosmos.
